summary: Iteration 118: HAR File Reported Issues - Backend API testing PASSED (11/11 tests). Forgot Password endpoints working correctly. Admin family member endpoints (add/remove) working correctly with deposit_date conversion. Frontend Forgot Password UI verified. Admin simulation flow for Family Accounts has working backend APIs but UI navigation to enter simulation mode for a specific licensee could be improved.

integration_issues.issue: Licensees (like Rizza Miles) don't appear in the Members Management table. They show in 'Licensed Users: 11' count but not accessible from the table. The backend APIs work correctly when simulation context is set.
integration_issues.priority: LOW - Backend works, UI navigation enhancement

issues: Console warnings about DialogContent requiring DialogTitle for accessibility

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns token for existing user (rizza.miles@gmail.com) - VERIFIED
✅ POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns null token for non-existing user - Security best practice
✅ POST /api/auth/reset-password resets password with valid token - VERIFIED
✅ POST /api/admin/family/members/{user_id} adds family member with deposit_date -> effective_start_date conversion - VERIFIED
✅ GET /api/admin/family/members/{user_id} returns family members with computed account_value and profit - VERIFIED
✅ GET /api/profit/licensee/year-projections?user_id=xxx returns projections for specified licensee - VERIFIED
✅ Frontend Forgot Password dialog: 3-step flow (email -> token -> success) working correctly
✅ Reset token is displayed in the dialog after email submission for easy copy

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Forgot Password UI works, Admin simulation navigation needs improvement

seed_data_creation: Test family members created and deleted during testing (TEST_HarFix_*, TEST_DeleteMe_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 118 verified HAR-reported fixes: Password Reset flow (forgot-password, reset-password endpoints) working correctly. Admin family member endpoints working with deposit_date parameter. The Forgot Password UI shows a 3-step dialog that correctly generates and displays reset tokens. Admin simulation for Family Accounts works via backend APIs, but the Members page UI doesn't show licensees in the main table - they may need a separate access method.

forgot_password_existing_user.details: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns token UUID for existing user

forgot_password_nonexisting_user.details: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns null token (security best practice)

reset_password_valid_token.details: POST /api/auth/reset-password successfully resets password and invalidates token

reset_password_validation.details: Invalid tokens return 400, short passwords rejected

admin_add_family_member.details: POST /api/admin/family/members/{user_id} adds member with deposit_date -> effective_start_date conversion

admin_get_family_members.details: GET /api/admin/family/members/{user_id} returns members with account_value and profit

admin_year_projections_user_id.details: GET /api/profit/licensee/year-projections?user_id=xxx returns projections for specified user

frontend_forgot_password_dialog.details: 3-step dialog: Enter email -> Token displayed (auto-filled) with password fields -> Success confirmation
